# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Configuration File (kong.conf)

# Admin API accessibility
admin_listen: 0.0.0.0:8001, 0.0.0.0:8444 ssl

# Client traffic
proxy_listen: 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl

# Database connection settings
database: postgres
pg_host: your_postgres_host
pg_port: 5432
pg_user: your_postgres_user
pg_password: your_postgres_password
pg_database: your_postgres_database
